title: API Error Code Troubleshooting Guide
content:
## API Error Troubleshooting Guide

### 500 Internal Server Error
1. Check server-side logs (/var/log/app/error.log)
2. Verify database connection pool status
3. Check dependent service health
4. If intermittent, may be connection pool exhaustion or memory leak

### Troubleshooting Steps
- Use curl to directly call the endpoint to confirm the issue
- Check Nginx access log for upstream response times
- Review JVM heap memory usage

### Common Solutions
- Increase connection pool max_connections
- Restart application service to release connections
- Add request rate limiting for protection

title: Data Export Operations Manual
content:
## Data Export Guide

### Method 1: Admin Panel Export
- Suitable for up to 100,000 records
- Set time range and click export
- If timeout occurs, narrow the time range

### Method 2: API Bulk Export
- POST /api/v2/export/async
- Supports 1,000,000+ records
- Download link sent via email after generation

### Method 3: Contact Technical Support
- For more than 3,000,000 records, contact technical support
- Offline data package delivery can be arranged

title: System Performance Optimization Tips
content:
## System Performance Optimization

### Frontend Performance
- Enable CDN for static resource acceleration
- Enable Gzip compression
- Use lazy loading to reduce initial page load time

### Backend Performance
- Add indexes to database queries
- Use Redis to cache hot data
- Use gRPC for inter-service communication

### Note: This article was last updated in June 2025; some information may be outdated

title: Permission Management Best Practices
content:
## Permission Management Guide

### Role Permission Configuration
1. Modify role permissions in Admin Panel -> Role Management
2. Users must re-login after changes for them to take effect
3. Some permissions are cached; wait up to 15 minutes

### Common Issues
- Permissions not taking effect: Ask user to sign out and re-login
- Permission conflicts: Check if user belongs to multiple role groups
- Special permissions: Some sensitive permissions require admin approval before taking effect

### Important Notes
- When modifying permissions in bulk, test in staging environment first
- Avoid directly modifying super admin permissions

title: New Employee Onboarding Guide
content:
## New Employee Onboarding Process

1. Collect office equipment
2. Set up corporate email and OA account
3. Complete security training
4. Join department group chats

### IT Related
- For VPN configuration, contact IT operations
- For code repository access, request from tech team lead
